tagline: Top Rated Pool Service & Landscaping in Peoria, Arizona

hero.headline:
Your Pool & Yard, Handled
by the Best
hero.subheadline: Brian and the Vistancia team keep Peoria pools crystal clear and yards pristine -- so you never have to worry about maintenance again. Owner-operated, 5-star rated, and trusted by your neighbors.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care & Landscaping<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors for your pool and yard. Brian and his team handle it all -- from weekly pool cleaning to full landscape overhauls -- with the care of a neighbor who takes pride in your property.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks to keep your pool crystal clear and swim-ready year-round in the Arizona heat.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing. We solve complex problems that other companies walk away from.

cards.title: Landscaping Maintenance
cards.description: Regular mowing, trimming, blowing, and general upkeep to keep your Vistancia property looking its absolute best through every season.

cards.title: Landscaping Cleanup
cards.description: Full front and backyard cleanups for overgrown or neglected properties. We restore your curb appeal and outdoor living spaces to pristine condition.

cards.title: Tree Trimming & Removal
cards.description: Professional tree trimming, shaping, and removal to maintain healthy trees and keep your yard safe, clean, and aesthetically pleasing.

cards.title: Irrigation Repair
cards.description: Quick and reliable irrigation system repair -- including emergency service -- to ensure your landscape stays properly watered and thriving.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Perfect Pool & Yard

steps.title: Call or Text Brian
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or yard. Brian personally responds within 24 hours with an honest, no-pressure quote. No contracts, no commitments.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our team arrives on schedule -- every time. Pool cleaning, chemical balancing, landscaping, tree work -- we take care of it all with meticulous attention to detail.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and your yard stays pristine. If you are ever not 100% satisfied, we come back and make it right -- that is our promise.

about.label: Why Peoria Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Neighbor-Recommended, 5-Star Rated
about.description: Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia was founded by Brian Beckman with one simple goal: treat every pool and yard like his own. With a perfect 5.0-star rating across 51 reviews, BBB accreditation, and a team that includes Zack and other skilled professionals, we have earned the trust of the Vistancia and Peoria communities through consistent, detail-oriented service that goes above and beyond.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Brian is personally involved in every project. You are never handed off to a random subcontractor -- the owner oversees your service.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises -- just great service.

features.title: Neighbor Nomination Program
features.description: Know a neighbor who needs help? Our complimentary nomination program gives qualifying customers their first visit free. Community first.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime -- no contracts, ever.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool & Yard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call Brian directly. We will come back and redo the work at no charge -- no questions asked. We have maintained a perfect 5-star rating because we never leave until the job is done right.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent pool issues or landscape emergencies, Brian will work with you to get someone out as quickly as possible. Just call or text (602) 887-4400.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pool and landscaping?
faqs.answer: Yes -- that is what sets us apart. One company, one team, one point of contact for your entire backyard. No more juggling multiple contractors or conflicting schedules.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Nope! Most clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you are out. Brian follows up personally on larger projects with weekly email updates so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: What is the neighbor nomination program?
faqs.answer: If you know a neighbor who could use pool or landscaping help, nominate them through our complimentary program. Qualifying customers receive their first visit completely free. It is our way of giving back to the Vistancia community.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Peoria, Vistancia, Surprise, Glendale, and surrounding areas in Arizona. If you are not sure whether we cover your neighborhood, give Brian a call and he will let you know right away.

testimonials.name: Joe J.
testimonials.text: Brian with Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia is the best pool company we have ever used in our 30 years as pool owners. Dependable and very knowledgeable -- we will never switch again.

testimonials.name: Ken C.
testimonials.text: Brian resolved a persistent pool system air problem that two other companies could not fix. His helpfulness goes beyond the service -- truly an outstanding professional.

testimonials.name: Kat I.
testimonials.text: Brian, Zack and the team are amazing. Hard working, timely, and always go above and beyond. Their integrity and professionalism are top notch -- highly recommend.

benefits: Free pool & yard inspection with every quote
